{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.0,
    "R1.2": 1.0,
    "R1.3": 0.0,
    "R1.4": 0.0,
    "R1.5": 0.0,
    "R1.6": 0.0,
    "R1.7": 0.0,
    "RX.1": 1.0,
    "RX.2": 1.0,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "active_set": ["R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "Assess the internal argument chain from setup and results to conclusions, checking for contradictions, non sequiturs, and unsupported logical leaps within the passage.",
    "RX.1": "Flag and communicate any limits to what a logic-only check can determine and note uncertainties in interpreting the passage’s reasoning.",
    "RX.2": "Avoid extending judgments beyond logical soundness and refrain from asserting empirical validity or prevalence accuracy.",
    "RX.3": "Keep the assessment strictly to logical consistency without veering into evidence adequacy, novelty, or writing polish.",
    "RX.4": "Avoid recommendations or interpretations that could promote harmful deployment or unfair worker inferences beyond the logic check.",
    "RX.5": "Tie any identified reasoning issues to specific sentences or transitions to maintain clear provenance of observations."
  }
}

rationale.R1.2: Assess the internal argument chain from setup and results to conclusions, checking for contradictions, non sequiturs, and unsupported logical leaps within the passage.
rationale.RX.1: Flag and communicate any limits to what a logic-only check can determine and note uncertainties in interpreting the passage’s reasoning.
rationale.RX.2: Avoid extending judgments beyond logical soundness and refrain from asserting empirical validity or prevalence accuracy.
rationale.RX.3: Keep the assessment strictly to logical consistency without veering into evidence adequacy, novelty, or writing polish.
rationale.RX.4: Avoid recommendations or interpretations that could promote harmful deployment or unfair worker inferences beyond the logic check.
rationale.RX.5: Tie any identified reasoning issues to specific sentences or transitions to maintain clear provenance of observations.
